basics.name: Your Name
basics.summary: I build reliable web experiences with a focus on performance, accessibility, and clean architecture.

hero.headline: Modern web CV, built in vanilla.
hero.subheadline: No frameworks. Just clean HTML/CSS/JS, Web Components, and a strong focus on UX.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I build user-facing products with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and maintainable systems.
I like pragmatic engineering: clear specs, measurable outcomes, and clean delivery.

achievements: Led the migration of a legacy monolithic frontend to a modern Signal-based architecture.
Improved Lighthouse scores across the main application from 60 to 95+.
Mentored junior developers and established high-quality PR review standards.
Designed and implemented a scalable REST API handling over 1M requests per day.
Reduced database query times by 40% through advanced indexing and query optimization.
Automated deployment pipelines using Docker and GitHub Actions, reducing ship time by 50%.
Developed pixel-perfect, responsive landing pages for international clients.
Integrated third-party APIs for payment gateways and CRM systems.
Optimized website assets and delivery, achieving under 1s load times on mobile.

projects.name: CV Website (Vanilla)
projects.description: Neo-brutalist CV built with Web Components, JSON-driven content, and a canvas particle graph.

projects.name: Mana Forge (Full Stack Monorepo)
projects.description: MTG deck analysis platform with a React UI, a Spring Boot REST API, and a stateless FastAPI AI engine (Groq Llama 3.3) delivering structured JSON insights.
highlights: Monorepo full-stack dev via Docker Compose
AI service is JSON-only + stateless (structured insights)
